title: Grunwerg Harley Table Knives, 18/0 Stainless Steel, Set of 12
features: TABLE KNIVES: This pack contains 12 stainless steel table knives.
TOP QUALITY STEEL: Each piece made of premium 18/0 stainless steel and finished to the highest standards.
HASSLE FREE CLEANING: all cutlery in this range is dishwasher safe, although hand washing is recommended.
SHEFFIELD-BORN COMPANY: The Harley range of stainless-steel cutlery by Sheffield family company Grunwerg captures all the tradition and prestige of the world’s cutlery capital!
description: From the manufacturer Harley, comfortable and practical Featuring a minimalistic yet stylish finish, the Harley range of cutlery will suit any home or restaurant. A great way to bring flair to your dining experience without breaking the bank. Quality cutlery from a brand you can trust Founded in 1945, the award-winning Grunwerg family business produces high-quality household goods and catering products, specializing in high-quality steel. The company is headed by the Grunwerg family, which is located in the steel city of Sheffield. The guaranteed high-quality Grunwerg product range remains the first choice among professionals and renowned chefs in the food industry. Elegant and durable design Part of our stylish Parish Collection The Parish Collection cutlery by Grunwerg combines ergonomic design with durable, stainless steel construction to provide a hardwearing and reliable set of cutleries which are suitable for home or for professional catering settings! All are made from high-quality 18/0 stainless steel. Although hand washing is recommended, this cutlery can easily be cleaned in your dishwasher. Made from the finest quality 18/0 stainless steel making every part of the range rust resistant. You'll receive 12 pieces of your chosen cutlery. Check out the Grunwerg store for our full range of Harley cutlery along with all our kitchenware!
